transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today,
I prepared some Ramyun
These are my favorite Ramyun brands
This is the Bibigo (brand) Seolleongtang (Ox Bone Soup)
This is not an ad
All the Ramyun I cooked in this broth was amazing
You can put everything, but that's a waste
So half water, half broth
I'm going to mix them in later
But first, I will go with my usual
Bibigo has the Beef Bone Broth as well
But I like the Ox Bone Soup more
1, 2
This is such a luxurious Ramyun
Incredible

Rest of the seasoning powder
Can't forget about it
That looks good
It should still be good without the Ramyun seasoning powder and just the bone broth
Bon appetit
It's seriously the best
Ouch
Wrap with kimchi
So good
The broth is soaked in by these noodles So it's insanely good
Kimchi tastes good And the noodles are the best
Let's take the noodles out before they get bloated
Get some broth
Scoop a bit
Do you see the meat?
It goes well together

Is the fire webfoot octopus noodle spicy?
Not at all If I can tolerate it, then anybody can
Even if the noodles are bloated, The noodles soaked up all the broth
So it's really good
Yum
I always feel like if I mix the Squid Jjamppong noodles and the Shin Ramyun Black noodles, it feels more than usual
Not sure why
The bowl is heavy so it's hard to hold
No! Don't fall
Tasty
This is the Squid Jjamppong and Shin Ramyun Black mixed together In Bibigo Ox Bone Broth
Yum
Is that it? A chunk of meat!
This is tasty too
The broth gets better over time
It's wasteful to pour this out

This broth is thick enough
Let's add more broth and cook more noodles
All the flakes must go in
Let's add about this much
How many do I put?
The color of the broth doesn't look too appetizing, right?
Since the broth has been cooked 2 times now
It's crazy It wasn't like this before
It tastes like the traditional broth
It's so good Nothing else needs to be added
It's the best
Insane!
So good
It's better 2nd time around
It really does get better over time
It's too good

Hot
So good
Welcome
1 chopstick=1 pack of noodles
Hot! Wait wait!
I almost got burned
The broth is really thick
When it goes "chup-chup" in your mouth
How do I say this?
It just sticks to your mouth
Can I cook something else?
I'm sick of it already
I usually get sick of something that's really strong and tasty
This is fine, but
I wouldn't like to eat 2 more of this
That's how I feel

The flavor is really tasty
But
The flavor is very strong
It's not too greasy, but
I'm not feeling it
Delicious
It's good
[Chat: Do you know what being full feels like?] Of course, I do
But not too often
Meat
Yes, curry noodles taste good
I have scallion kimchi
Should I bring it? Nah, it's too late
Let's bring it
Over here
Very good

That song is stuck in my head
Thanks everyone~
